finding: CM-0010 is assigned to two different continuity claims in separate sanctioned storage roots, while the current validator scans only the monolithic index and operations/continuity/records.

claim_states.observed: The duplicate identifier and validator scope are directly present in repository sources.
claim_states.proposed: Expand validation to all sanctioned roots and migrate one identifier additively.
claim_states.unresolved: No canonical alias or migration rule exists yet.

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and source structure only; no private chat, health, credentials, personal identifiers, or uploaded-file content inspected or reproduced.
falsification_route: A repository-wide validator that already includes operations/continuity/memory, or evidence that one CM-0010 artifact has a different canonical ID through an additive alias, would falsify or resolve the finding.
